title: dryopteris phegopteris
intro: Dryopteris phegopteris, also known as the lady fern or autumn fern, is a species of fern native to Europe, Asia, and North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Dryopteris phegopteris include its ability to reduce fever, ease pain, and promote digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and teas, can be made by drying the fronds and steeping them in hot water to release their medicinal properties.
